promotable_facts.fact: Franchisor has never owned or operated any hotels — operations conducted entirely by affiliates
Franchise Agreement FA term may be shorter than 20 years for conversion hotels — determined by franchisor based on age, condition, location
System Services Fee pooled across all ESA Network brands including Select and Premier — SSF not required from franchisor-owned hotels
Digital/email marketing prohibited for franchisees — all digital marketing conducted by franchisor
Other revenues in 2024 include $2.1M in contract termination fees — major contributor to profitability swing
Franchised hotels rely more on Property Direct bookings (33.2%) vs owned (19.3%) — less system-driven demand
As of March 2025, 15 company-owned hotels under contract for sale to franchisees, 2 for de-branding — ongoing system contraction
Franchisee must notify franchisor of alleged breach within 1 year or claim is waived — short limitations clause in FA
Franchisor may suspend reservation service, website listing, and loyalty program as interim remedy
Class action waiver and punitive damages waiver in FA
